reviews.review_description: Best way I can describe the game is it has the looks of paper Mario mixed with yoshis crafted world, and plays like a first person Mario 64...lots of variety not only between levels, but also the different worlds all have unique themes and as you play you'll gain different types of power ups, from a simple torch, to a grapple gun and even a hoverboard...and the cherry on top is the level creator built into the game that you can use to create your own levels and share them with others as well as play levels other players have created much like Mario maker, I'm hoping to see this game get the attention it deserves and get some good level builders in here providing potentially endless content not unlike Mario maker...
I really enjoy the game and glad to have a game that reminds me of Mario in VR!! If you loved Mario, I believe you'll enjoy this!
